narrative:
Stonelick Township E (precinct in Clermont County) has 705 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.5 percentage points.
